Layout.name: FAT Title Localisation

StyledText.Data: Follow localisation process stage by stage. If breaking the process, use tools for improvising.

Calculation.Text: "Start machine translation of texts that have been changed since last translation or haven't been translated yet."

StyledText.Data: Translate texts using selected machine translation API.
Create files to send to translation agency
When files are translated - import files from agency.

Calculation.Text: FAT Localisation::Localisation stage < 3 Or FAT Localisation::Translation method ≠ "Human translation"
"Start machine translation of texts that have been changed since last translation or haven't been translated yet."
IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation::Translation API ) Or FAT Localisation::Translation method ≠ "Machine translation"

SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation::Localisation stage ) & SetProperty ( "event_text" ; "Manual change of translation method to " & FAT Localisation::Translation method)

StyledText.Data: Start machine translation of texts that have been changed since last translation or haven't been translated yet. Texts marked as Approved will not be touched.

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Localisation @ Title::Title localisation id)

LayoutObject.name: Package icon 2
Package icon 2 Copy

Calculation.Text: Not FAT Localisation @ Title::Shared text localisation

StyledText.Data: Package information: <<FAT Package @ Title Localisation::Description>> Package directory on server: <<FAT Package @ Title Localisation::FC Package directory>>

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Title::Package id ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; FAT Localisation @ Title::Localisation code ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation @ Title::Localisation stage )
Not FAT Localisation @ Title::Shared text localisation

LayoutObject.name: Green
Yellow
Red
Black

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Localisation::Title id ) & SetProperty ( "title_localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; FAT Localisation::Localisation code ) & SetProperty ( "translation_method"; FAT Localisation::Translation method )
"If not all packages in Title are listed below - click to add missing packages."
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not reviewed" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"

SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not translated" )& SetProperty ( "exception" ; "Reviewed" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Approved" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not translated" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"

StyledText.Data: Change text review status on all texts in localisation.
Change text status on text with certain conditions
Export all translated texts to a Word document

Calculation.Text: "Export all localised texts in title to one single JSON file."
"Export all texts with status Not Approved in the whole Title to one single JSON file."
"Export all texts to a Word document (HTML)"

StyledText.Data: To make a localisation more efficient. Replace Not translated and Not reviewed texts with Approved if identical original texts are found in the selected Package or Title.

ScriptReference.name: Replace not reviewed texts with approved CL

Calculation.Text: FAT Localisation::gUseApprovedTranslationsFrom = "Title" And IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gClient ) And IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gTitle ) Or FAT Localisation::gUseApprovedTranslationsFrom = "Package in Title" And IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation::gUseApprovedTranslationsFromId ) Or IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation::gUseApprovedTranslationsFrom )

SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not translated" )& SetProperty ( "exception" ; "Changed" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"

StyledText.Data: Export texts to a JSON file
Change text status for texts where original text is changed AFTER localised texts have been created.
Change text status only for texts that are not reviewed.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not reviewed" )& SetProperty ( "exception" ; "Changed" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"

SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation::Localisation stage ) & SetProperty ( "status_type" ; "progress" )
"Logs the current approval progress in percent."
"Write a note to add to the event log"
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation::Localisation stage )

StyledText.Data: Add a note to event log

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation::Localisation stage ) & SetProperty ( "status_type" ; "size" )
"Logs the current number of texts that belongs to the localisation."

SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation::Localisation stage ) & SetProperty ( "status_type" ; "status" )
"Logs the current status of all texts."

StyledText.Data: View and log history of all events happened in the process of this localisation.
These are the external reviewers of this localisation. Add a new reviewer in FAT User administration.
Translation to <<FAT Localisation::Language in Country>> (<<Localisation code>>)

Stage Name Text status HT Text status MT 1. Language added - (text does not exist) - (text does not exist) 2. Text prepared for translation Not translated Not translate 3. Original text sent Not translated Translation id:¶[id_from_api] (async only) 4. Translated text imported Not reviewed Not reviewed 5. Translation in review In progress In progress 6. Translation approved Approved Approved

Calculation.Text: "Set the translation stage for this translation"
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation::PrimaryKey) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation::Localisation stage)

StyledText.Data: Stage 1 - Language added The language is added to this Title/Package but no localised items have yet been created. Stage 2 - Text prepared for translation Press the button “Translate” to translate all items included in this Title/Packager. A machine translation handles stage 2, 3 and 4 automatically. Stage 3 - Send text to translation API. All texts are sent to translation the selected translation API. Stage 4 - Translated text imported When translated texts recieved from the API, import texts back to the FAT. These texts will be set to status “In progress”. Publish a ML Beta - a localised version using normal export in FAT. Stage 5 -Translation in review During and after the Beta test - text will be edited directly in FAT. If a new machine translation is made existing texts that are not marked “Approved” will be overwritten with updated texts. Stage 6 - Translated text approved Publish an approved ML Master - a localised version using normal export in FAT.

CharacterStyle.Text: The language is added to this Title/Package but no localised items have yet been created.
Press the button “Translate” to translate all items included in this Title/Packager. A machine translation handles stage 2, 3 and 4 automatically.
All texts are sent to translation the selected translation API.
When translated texts recieved from the API, import texts back to the FAT. These texts will be set to status “In progress”. Publish a ML Beta - a localised version using normal export in FAT.
During and after the Beta test - text will be edited directly in FAT. If a new machine translation is made existing texts that are not marked “Approved” will be overwritten with updated texts.
Publish an approved ML Master - a localised version using normal export in FAT.

StyledText.Data: Stage 1 - Language added The language is added to this Title/Package but no localised items have yet been created. Stage 2 - Create translation files Press the button to export all items included in this Title/Package to the root of your local export folder. Please note that ALL texts are included in two files regardless of number of packages or usage of VTT subtitles! Stage 3 - Send text to translation agency or translator Now send all items in the folder “send_to_translators” in your local directory. You can also invite a translator to login to FAT and translate directly in the system. Stage 4 - Import text files When translated texts recieved from the translator, import texts back to FAT. These texts will be set to status “In progress”. Publish a ML Beta - a localised version using normal export in FAT. Stage 5 -Translation in review During and after the Beta test - text will be edited directly in FAT or new updated text files may be sent to Funkis. New texts needs to be imported again. The import is smart, existing texts that are not marked “Approved” will be overwritten with updated texts. Stage 6 - Translated text approved Publish an approved ML Master - a localised version using normal export in FAT.

CharacterStyle.Text: The language is added to this Title/Package but no localised items have yet been created.

Press the button to export all items included in this Title/Package to the root of your local export folder. Please note that ALL texts are included in two files regardless of number of packages or usage of VTT subtitles!
Now send all items in the folder “send_to_translators” in your local directory. You can also invite a translator to login to FAT and translate directly in the system.
When translated texts recieved from the translator, import texts back to FAT. These texts will be set to status “In progress”. Publish a ML Beta - a localised version using normal export in FAT.

During and after the Beta test - text will be edited directly in FAT or new updated text files may be sent to Funkis. New texts needs to be imported again. The import is smart, existing texts that are not marked “Approved” will be overwritten with updated texts.
Publish an approved ML Master - a localised version using normal export in FAT.
